import shutil, os, json
d=os.path.expanduser('~/Programming/PseudoCoup_v0/DevComms/hostruns/results')
src='walks/bundle'
if not os.path.isdir(src):
    print('NO BUNDLE DIR'); raise SystemExit
dst=d+'/240_bundle'
shutil.copytree(src, dst, dirs_exist_ok=True)
shutil.copy('walks/py_walk.json', d+'/240_py_walk.json')
w=json.load(open('walks/py_walk.json'))
n=len(os.listdir(dst+'/screenshots'))
routes=sorted(set(v['route'] for v in w['states'].values()))
print('screenshots:', n, 'states:', len(w['states']), 'match:', n==len(w['states']))
print('route types:', len(routes))
print('routes:', routes)
newly=[r for r in routes if any(k in r for k in ('cooldown','summary','stretch'))]
print('B07 CONFIRM - workout-completion screens reached:', newly if newly else 'NONE')
